roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report

/CAL: TRAILING 210001523/INTC/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM TERMINATED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE PROBATION IN 210001523,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #21011422 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:DA 1203,,2PC MOTION/X:JOSEPH MESSA, SPANISH INTERPRETER,PRESENT/INTC/WIAMTR/S17/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:1/CONTD:TRAILING 210001523/DOP/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 18D/CTS:18/VF2:150/WS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X:RESTITUTION FROM DISMISSED COUNTS IS HARVEY WAIVED TO THIS PROBATION ANDIS RESERVED/CTORD: ALLL FINES AND FEES WAIVED EXCEPT 150 VIF/SAORD/SA2:350 TEXAS STREET SF,CA/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/
/AMEND:1/X:COUNT 1 IS REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO 17BPC ON DA'S MOTION/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 12-03-21 (10)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY ANDWILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//SA2: 350 TEXAS ST SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
